ab: ngahla isa tukucu ku ia Mai, kana’ana ia ihlaisa mʉmʉa mamaini Hla’alua.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Mai，他也是拉阿魯哇族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Mai, and he is also an Hla’alua child.
We study together in the Rʉhlʉcʉ tribe.

ab: karʉkʉhlʉ amu pasaʉlʉsʉ tumimahla hlamama kisuahlahlama, rianʉamu tam macahlia masi kari Hla’alua.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說拉阿魯哇語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Hla’alua proficiently.

ab: tam langicaku tam mavʉhlʉ aku mʉmʉa, tam mikasekase hla tam mirihlia Mai.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Mai很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Mai is short and thin.

ab: tam kuatitipa Mai, tam marumukua cucu’u mʉmʉa kana’ana.
ch: Mai很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Mai is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
